tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Identify EOP planned for current Model year &create model buildout list
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 1) Review of OEM calendar & determine model list based on IHS data - set review schedule

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Creation of part list from OEM database
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 2) Potential buildout part list is created for target vehicle buildout. This includes all finished goods and components for the purpose of tracking exposure at EOP and progress towards zero.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Categorize part list into Common/Unique
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 3) Categorize list into Common/Unique parts. Common parts do not require inventory tracking. Unique parts require finished good, raw material, purchased component, DSPS, and packaging due to the high risk of obsolescence

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Create initial buildout workbook & distribute to Team
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 4) Initial Buildout workbook created & obsolete inventory exposure identified

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Review of items for carryover
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 5) Review of items identified as potential for buildout are confirmed with customer for carryover to new vehicle models

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Review lead times of raw materials, identify risks, and reduce orders as necessary
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 6) Review lead times for raw materials/components/packaging/DSPS & identify long lead time items. Risks of current open orders identified and actions to reduce orders taken.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Review Supplier MOQ & negotiate reduction as necessary
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 7) Review Supplier MOQ for raw material, purchased components, packaging, and DSPS to identify risks for obsolete inventory at conclusion of buildout activity. Communicate change points to team.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Analyze investment perofrmance for capitalized equipment
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 8) Analyze payback of any invested capital equipment to insure zero book value at conclusion of buildout. Communicate risks to buildout team & Accounting.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Revise pricing of purchased parts if applicable
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 9) Revise pricing of raw material, purchased components, packaging, and DSPS based on new MOQ negotiated in step (5)

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Review Packaging and storage needs
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 10) Review packaging needed to support transition from MP to Service. Determine storage needs based on service inventory target levels.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Equipment footprint review if required
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 11) Review of assembly equipment footprint and determine floor space reduction if available. Determine service production method (current line, reduced line, or by hand)

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Setting of service inventory levels
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 12) Inventory levels for service part finished goods/raw materials/purchased components/packaging/DSPS are set.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Setting of service part production run targets
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 13) Determine cost effective production frequency to maintain proper service part inventory levels as set in step (10).

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Determine equipment storage plan
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 14) Assembly equipment/tooling/verification equipment/check fixture storage plans are established.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Notification to supply base
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 15) Buildout notifications sent to purchased component/packaging/DSPS/outsource suppliers

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Capacity tracker updated for volume reduction
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 16) Update capacity files to identify and track volume reduction.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Remove item from buildout section of capacity report
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 17) Remove item from buildout section of capacity report

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Complete final comp request & submit to customer
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 18) Identify and compile compensation requests to submit to customers that cause obsolescence.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Update item status in oracle to service
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 19) Item Status updated in Oracle to Service

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: new NPIF is implemented
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 20) New NPIF is implemented to reflect Service level packaging. Oracle packaging updated & cost re-rolled.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Implement equpment reduction
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 21) Mfg. Equipment layout is reduced (if applicable) and unused components stored

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: Storage plans implemented
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 22) Tools, Fixtures, & Equipment identified for storage are prepared and shipped per plan.

tblBuildoutTasks.Activity: implement sales price changes as necessary
tblBuildoutTasks.Process_x0020_Description: 23) Selling Prices updated based on cost to produce & target profit
